title: What does the ‘.abs’ keywords  represent Verilog in the VVP file
body:
# Question
I found the keyword ‘.abs’ in the VVP file, but I don’t know what it corresponds to in Verilog? In the VVP simulator source code,'.abs' seems to belong to the category of arithmetic operations, but there seems to be no absolute value operator in Verilog.
```c
// in the file lexor.lex
".abs"          { return K_ARITH_ABS; }
```
I would like to express my sincere thanks if you can answer my question
code_blocks:
// in the file lexor.lex
".abs"          { return K_ARITH_ABS; }
